headline: Marriott International and The Fern Hotels & Resorts Celebrate 75 Signings and 50 Openings for Series by Marriott in India
summary: Marriott International, Inc. today announced landmark dual milestones for The Fern Hotels & Resorts, Series by Marriott in India - 75 hotels have now been signed under the brand's founding collaboration with Concept Hospitality Private Limited (CHPL), while 50 of those properties are already open and welcoming guests - bringing over 3,556 rooms into Marriott's portfolio in India. Accomplished in under six months since the brand's debut in November 2025, this pace of growth stands as one of the m
